    RoleModel.add(RoleBean bean)
    Adds a new Role record to the database after validating that the role name does not already exist.
    long
    StudentModel.add(StudentBean bean)
    Adds a new Student record to the database after verifying that the email ID is unique and resolving the associated college name.
    long
    SubjectModel.add(SubjectBean bean)
    Adds a new Subject record to the database after verifying that the subject name is unique and resolving its dependency details from CourseModel.
    long
    TimetableModel.add(TimetableBean bean)
    Adds a new Timetable record after fetching course and subject details.
    long
    UserModel.add(UserBean bean)

    Checks if a specific subject under a course already has an exam scheduled on the given date.

    MarksheetModel.getMeritList(int pageNo, int pageSize)
